products.name: TX10 (5-2-8)
products.frequency: Every 8-12 weeks year-round
products.compatibilityNotes: Compatible with most programs; low scorch risk
products.warnings: Iron stains concrete - brush/blow off promptly
products.notes: Multi-source organic fertiliser. Contains mycorrhiza fungi. Safe around children and pets.

products.name: Maintain (26-1-9)
products.frequency: Every 10-12 weeks during active growth
products.compatibilityNotes: Compatible with most programs
products.warnings: Iron stains concrete - brush/blow off promptly
products.notes: 70% slow-release nitrogen. Feeds up to 3 months. Kikuyu + Couch only in program.

products.name: GreenXtra
products.frequency: Monthly during active growth; per program in winter
products.compatibilityNotes: Compatible with Tracemaxx + HiCure at reduced Tracemaxx rate; dilute with water before mixing
products.warnings: IRON OVERLOAD: reduce Tracemaxx to 100mL/100sqm when used with GreenXtra at 200mL/100sqm. Stains hard surfaces.
products.notes: Allow to dry on leaf - do NOT water in. Apply in cool hours.

products.name: Tracemaxx
products.analysis: Fe + Mn + Zn + 7 essential trace nutrients
products.frequency: Monthly to 6-weekly
products.compatibilityNotes: Compatible with GreenXtra + HiCure at reduced rate; dilute with water before mixing
products.warnings: IRON OVERLOAD: always use at 100mL/100sqm when tank-mixing with GreenXtra at 200mL/100sqm.
products.notes: Prevents nutrient deficiencies. Increases colour response.

products.name: Liquid Iron (7%)
products.frequency: Monthly or as needed for colour response
products.compatibilityNotes: Add to water first before other products. Can join main tank-mix when Tracemaxx is already at reduced rate.
products.warnings: Stains hard surfaces. Do NOT mix as concentrate directly with other products - dilute in water first.
products.notes: Fast dark green colour response. Apply in cool conditions. In v2.0 program: added to winter/transition months.

products.name: Activ8EXTRA
products.analysis: NPK ~8-1-5 + seaweed + fish + humates + fulvic acid
products.frequency: Fortnightly (summer); monthly (cooler months)
products.applicationMethod: Backpack or handheld sprayer or hose-on
products.compatibilityNotes: Compatible with Seaweed Secrets + Nature's Soil Wetter + Hydramaxx; jar test before mixing with iron products
products.warnings: Avoid mixing iron concentrates directly. Apply in cool hours.
products.notes: Nitrogen-boosted version of Activ8mate. Feeds soil biology and plant simultaneously. Bio run Pass 2 product.

products.name: Seaweed Secrets
products.analysis: Ascophyllum nodosum kelp + humic acid + fulvic acid + 70+ minerals
products.frequency: Fortnightly to monthly
products.compatibilityNotes: Compatible with Activ8EXTRA + Nature's Soil Wetter; add Liquid Iron to water separately
products.warnings: Do not mix Liquid Iron as concentrate with this product.
products.notes: Cold-processed kelp. Improves root growth, stress resistance and soil microbes. To be replaced by Fertech Kelpro.

products.name: Kelpxtra
products.analysis: Ascophyllum nodosum kelp + minerals + vitamins + trace elements + cytokinins + betaines + auxins
products.frequency: Every 2-4 weeks (maintenance); every 7-10 days (new lawn)
products.compatibilityNotes: MUST be applied solo - do not mix with any other product
products.warnings: CRITICAL: Must ALWAYS be applied separately from ALL other products. Never tank mixed. Stains hard surfaces.
products.notes: Bio run Pass 1 product — always solo. Increases pest/frost/disease resistance. Apply in cool hours.

products.name: Stimulus
products.frequency: Every 2-6 weeks
products.compatibilityNotes: Compatible with most programs; jar test before mixing
products.warnings: Minimum 5L water carrier per 100sqm.
products.notes: High-phosphorus NPK drives root growth. Bio run Pass 2 product in most months.

products.name: Hydramaxx
products.frequency: Every 6-8 weeks or as needed for dry patch
products.compatibilityNotes: Compatible with most products; dilute with water before mixing
products.warnings: Dilute with water before mixing with other concentrates.
products.notes: Bio run Pass 2 product (autumn/winter/spring). Reduces overall water use. To be replaced by Hydrolink Advance.

products.name: Nature's Soil Wetter
products.analysis: Complex organic compounds: botanical extracts, humates, fulvates
products.frequency: Monthly standard; fortnightly for soil correction
products.compatibilityNotes: Compatible with Activ8EXTRA + Seaweed Secrets + Stimulus; jar test with acidic products
products.warnings: May be incompatible with acidic materials - jar test first.
products.notes: CSIRO-backed petrochemical-free formula. Used in summer main tank-mix and bio run Pass 2. To be replaced by Hydrolink Advance.

products.name: Tombstone Duo
products.frequency: Preventative: every 21-28 days; Curative: every 14-21 days
products.compatibilityNotes: Good tank mix compatibility
products.warnings: Max 2 consecutive applications then rotate fungicide group (resistance management).
products.notes: Spot treatment / curative. Not in v2.0 program schedule — use if disease appears.

products.name: Heritage Maxx
products.frequency: Every 14-28 days; max 2 consecutive applications then rotate
products.applicationMethod: Hose-on or boom sprayer - NOT backpack sprayer
products.compatibilityNotes: Tank mix compatible with other fungicides and foliar fertilisers
products.warnings: DO NOT apply with backpack sprayer (label restriction). DO NOT apply through irrigation. Toxic to apple trees nearby.
products.notes: Scheduled: November (preventative), February (late summer), December (conditional). Protection of new growth up to 28 days.

products.name: Spartan
products.frequency: 2x per year: March (winter weed prevention) + September (summer weed prevention)
products.compatibilityNotes: Pairs well with soil wetter for improved soil penetration
products.warnings: Pre-emergent only - will not kill established weeds. Area must be weed-free before application. Water in within 7 days (6mm minimum).
products.notes: 20mL = ~6 month control. 0.5L stock = 2 full applications across 140m². Scheduled: March Wk1 + September Wk1.

products.name: HiCure
products.analysis: 62.5% w/w amino acids + peptides (19 amino acids)
products.frequency: Every 2 weeks (fortnightly) — applied every Wk1 main run
products.compatibilityNotes: Compatible with GreenXtra + Tracemaxx tank-mix; dilute with water before mixing
products.warnings: Dilute with water before combining in tank. Do not apply in extreme heat.
products.notes: Syngenta professional amino acid biostimulant. Abiotic stress defence, recovery support. In every main tank-mix. QTY TO CONFIRM — set to 1L estimate.

products.name: Bow & Arrow
products.analysis: MCPA 300 g/L + Clopyralid 20 g/L + Diflufenican 15 g/L - Group 1/3/4
products.frequency: As needed; conditional in April, July, October
products.compatibilityNotes: DO NOT mix with or use alongside any product containing MCPA (conflicts with Contra M Duo)
products.warnings: Do NOT mow 3-4 days before/after. No rain forecast 48 hours. Minor transient discolouration possible on Kikuyu.
products.notes: Slower acting but thorough - typically no regrowth. Conditional task — only apply if broadleaf weeds visible.

products.name: Tribute
products.frequency: As needed for grass weed control — conditional in July, November
products.applicationMethod: Foliar spray - medium droplet nozzle; max nozzle height 50cm
products.compatibilityNotes: Zoysia + Couch ONLY — NEVER apply to back lawn (Kikuyu)
products.warnings: NOT for Kikuyu (suppressive). NOT for Buffalo. NOT for Queensland Blue Couch. Do not mow 3-4 days before/after. No rain 48 hours. Do not apply to stressed turf.
products.notes: Suppresses Kikuyu - NEVER use on back lawn. Front lawn + strips only.

products.name: Contra M Duo
products.frequency: As needed for broadleaf weed control
products.compatibilityNotes: DO NOT mix with Bow & Arrow (both contain MCPA)
products.warnings: NOT for Buffalo. Do not mow 2 days before/after. No fertiliser within 2 weeks.
products.notes: Controls 38 broadleaf weeds. Not in v2.0 scheduled program — spot treatment as needed.

products.name: Acelepryn
products.frequency: 1x per year: September Wk1 — back lawn only (limited stock)
products.compatibilityNotes: Compatible with most programs
products.warnings: LOW STOCK - 0.1L remaining. Apply to back lawn (Kikuyu) only this season. Consider restocking.
products.notes: Exempt from poison scheduling. Very low toxicity to birds, fish, bees. No re-entry restrictions.

products.name: Battle Insecticide
products.frequency: As needed; conditional in Dec, Jan, Feb if pest activity observed
products.applicationMethod: Backpack or pump sprayer - fine even spray
products.compatibilityNotes: Compatible with most programs
products.warnings: Scheduled pesticide - handle with care. Check Zoysia label before front lawn application.
products.notes: Knockdown and residual action. Conditional task in summer months — only if pest activity observed.

products.name: Tombstone Duo
products.frequency: Preventative: every 21-28 days; Curative: every 14-21 days
products.compatibilityNotes: NOT safe on Zoysia. Good tank mix compatibility otherwise.
products.warnings: NOT for Zoysia front lawn. Max 2 consecutive applications then rotate fungicide group.
products.notes: Kikuyu + Couch only. Spot treatment or curative. Not in v2.0 scheduled program.

compatibility.rule: Kelpxtra must NEVER be tank mixed with any other product
Iron overload: Tracemaxx always at 100mL/100sqm when using GreenXtra at 200mL/100sqm
Bow & Arrow and Contra M Duo both contain MCPA — never use together
Tribute is NOT safe on Kikuyu — front lawn + strips only. NEVER spray back lawn.
Tombstone Duo is NOT safe on Zoysia — Kikuyu + Couch only. NEVER spray front lawn.
Heritage Maxx must NOT be applied with a backpack sprayer (label restriction)
